package rulecoverage

func PositiveSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBound() string {
    ruleID := "slice_append_without_prealloc_known_bound"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Slice append inside a range loop without visible preallocation when the bound is locally known."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
